LinkedJoin.Join: C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID

C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID

C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND GA.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = GA.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE

Query.tables: J CPR P CT CCBC C

LinkedJoin.Join: C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND J.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND ( J.STATUS = 'VARIED' OR J.STATUS IS NULL ) AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = J.AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = J.AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CT.CODE = J.JUDGMENT_COURT_CODE AND CCBC.RV_LOW_VALUE = J.INSTALMENT_PERIOD AND CCBC.RV_DOMAIN = 'INSTALMENT_PERIOD'

C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND IP.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND IP.JUDG_SEQ = J.JUDG_SEQ AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = IP.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = IP.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = IP.CASE_NUMBER

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER", A.AE_NUMBER AS "A.AE_NUMBER", A.AE_TYPE AS "A.AE_TYPE", A.DATE_OF_RECEIPT AS "A.DATE_OF_RECEIPT", A.DATE_OF_CREATION AS "A.DATE_OF_CREATION", A.DATE_OF_ISSUE AS "A.DATE_OF_ISSUE", A.AMOUNT_OF_AE AS "A.AMOUNT_OF_AE", A.DEBTOR_OCCUPATION AS "A.DEBTOR_OCCUPATION", A.PAYROLL_NUMBER AS "A.PAYROLL_NUMBER", A.NAMED_EMPLOYER AS "A.NAMED_EMPLOYER", A.AE_FEE AS "A.AE_FEE", A.CAPS_SEQUENCE AS "A.CAPS_SEQUENCE", A.ISSUING_CRT_CODE AS "A.ISSUING_CRT_CODE", A.JUDG_SEQ AS "A.JUDG_SEQ", A.AMOUNT_OF_AE_CURRENCY AS "A.AMOUNT_OF_AE_CURRENCY", A.AE_FEE_CURRENCY AS "A.AE_FEE_CURRENCY", A.CASE_NUMBER AS "A.CASE_NUMBER", A.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "A.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_COD", A.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "A.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO", A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE", A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AS "A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO", A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID AS "A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID", P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID", P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME", P.PARTY_TYPE_CODE AS "P.PARTY_TYPE_CODE", P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO", P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER", P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS", P.PREFERRED_COMMUNICATION_METHOD AS "P.PREFERRED_COM_METHOD", P.WELSH_INDICATOR AS "P.WELSH_INDICATOR", (SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ DISTINCT P1.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, PARTIES P1 WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.PARTY_ID = P1.PARTY_ID ) AS "PARTY_AGAINST_NAME", (SELECT /*+ ORDERED */ DISTINCT P2.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR2, PARTIES P2 WHERE CPR2.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2.CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2.PARTY_ID = P2.PARTY_ID ) AS "PARTY_FOR_NAME", (SELECT SUM(F.AMOUNT) FROM FEES_PAID F WHERE F.PROCESS_NUMBER = A.AE_NUMBER AND F.DELETED_FLAG != 'Y' AND F.DELETED_FLAG IS NOT NULL AND F.PROCESS_TYPE = 'A') AS "OTHER_FEE", (SELECT SUM(PY.AMOUNT) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = A.AE_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'AE' AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL) AS "TOTAL_FEE", A.ORA_ROWSCN AS "A_ORA_ROWSCN", P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM AE_APPLICATIONS A, PARTIES P, CASES C WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND A.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID

LinkedJoin.Join: C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND A.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND P.PARTY_ID = A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID AND GA.PARTY_ID = A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER", A.AE_NUMBER AS "A.AE_NUMBER", E.STD_EVENT_ID AS "E.STD_EVENT_ID", E.AE_EVENT_SEQ AS "E.AE_EVENT_SEQ" FROM AE_EVENTS E, CASES C, AE_APPLICATIONS A WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND A.CASE_NUMBER = C.CASE_NUMBER AND E.AE_NUMBER = A.AE_NUMBER AND E.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND E.STD_EVENT_ID IN (888, 889, 890, 900) ORDER BY E.DATE_ENTERED DESC, E.AE_EVENT_SEQ DESC
